narrative.headline: What 2017 Ford Fusion owners report most
narrative.summary: Engine and powertrain problems dominate owner reports for this model, with no-start conditions being the most commonly described symptom. Owners also report overheating without warning lights and electrical failures, several of which led to fires or crashes. The Energi plug-in hybrid variant appears frequently in complaints involving wiring and starting issues.

issues.title: Engine
issues.blurb: Owners report the vehicle failing to start, sometimes leading to dealer teardowns that reveal wiring harness faults within the hybrid system, with some incidents involving fire. · 4 fire · 1 injured

issues.title: Power Train
issues.blurb: Owners describe no-start conditions requiring towing, with some incidents attributed to wiring harness problems in the hybrid system, and some reports involving fires or crashes. · 1 fire · 5 crash · 6 injured

issues.title: Engine And Engine Cooling
issues.blurb: Owners report the temperature gauge rising sharply while driving at highway speeds, with no warning lights illuminating to alert them before the gauge reaches a high reading. · 2 fire

issues.title: Electrical System
issues.blurb: Owners report complete failure to start, with diagnosis revealing wiring harness faults in the hybrid system, and some incidents resulting in crashes. · 2 crash · 1 injured
